## 6) Benchmark: Q1 + Q6 — Cold / Hot / Polars

- **Cold** = `clear_cache()` before every timed run (includes JIT
  compilation of MAX graph + Mojo kernels)
- **Hot** = graph already compiled, reuse cached model (this is the
  steady-state for repeated queries)
